description_long: This object consists of three wooden directional signs, each mounted on a vertical post. The signs are rectangular with one end shaped into an arrowhead, clearly indicating direction. The wood texture is visible, with a natural brown color and subtle grain patterns, giving a rustic appearance. The signs are of varying sizes, with the largest having an additional smaller plank attached below the main arrow. There are no visible inscriptions or symbols on the sign faces. The construction appears sturdy, suitable for outdoor placement in parks, trails, or rural urban areas.
description: A set of three rustic wooden directional signs with arrow-shaped ends, mounted on vertical posts and featuring natural wood grain.
description_view_0: Three wooden directional signs with arrowheads are visible, showing their faces and the attached posts; the largest has an extra plank below.
description_view_1: The signs are viewed edge-on, revealing the thickness of the planks and the posts, with the arrow shapes visible in profile.
description_view_2: The signs are seen from the back, showing the reverse side of the arrowheads and the posts, with the mounting structure visible.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view, similar to view 1, highlighting the depth of the wooden planks and the arrow shapes.
